description: This file defines an API route for listing audit log entries in a FastAPI application. It sets up an API router with a GET endpoint that retrieves audit logs from a repository, formats the response, and applies authentication roles.

classes.name: AuditLogResponse
classes.description: Schema model representing an audit log entry.

methods.name: list[AuditLogResponse] list_audits( limit: int = 200, offset: int = 0, audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), _: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
methods.description: API endpoint to retrieve a list of audit logs with optional pagination.

ctags.name: list_audits
ctags.signature: ( limit: int = 200, offset: int = 0, audits_repo: AuditsRepository = Depends(), _: dict = Depends(require_roles(RoleName.admin)), )
